rules.name: GPT LONG EVERY CANDLE 1H UP 15M V2 OPTIMIZED
rules.thesis: LONG o moi nen 15m nhung chi khi 1h dang tang. Chi trade TREND_RESUME va SQUEEZE. SL/TP toi uu theo structure + ATR tu grid-search.
entryRules: Moi nen moi tao tren 15m deu co the vao LONG
Chi giu 2 context: TREND_RESUME va SQUEEZE
rules.entry: Vao LONG tai moi nen 15m khi trend 1h dang UP. Bo qua PULLBACK_BUY.
rules.stopLoss: SL = max(structure low, ATR15m*1.3) roi clamp toi thieu 0.55%. Structure lay 15m lookback 6 nen va 1h lookback 4 nen, cong them buffer 0.12%.
cancelRules: Bo qua neu 1h khong con UP
Bo qua neu context la PULLBACK_BUY
notes: Grid-search 378000 combo tren du lieu 1 nam.
Context SQUEEZE dong gop manh hon TREND_RESUME.
Bai hoc: maxHold ngan va TP gan hon giup rule nay tang PNL.
